message:
feat(db): denormalize recipients_json on message insert, reformat search_service

Add sync_message_recipients_json to persist a JSON array of recipients
directly on the messages row at dispatch time, avoiding repeated JOINs
in read paths. Includes test coverage. Search service gets formatting
improvements only (line-length, match arm alignment).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
